# Summary — EKS Pod Identity Composition

**Spec**: [SPEC-0000](spec.md)
**PR**: N/A (predates spec workflow)
**Issue**: N/A (foundational composition)
**Merged**: 2024-01-15
**Generated by**: Manual (2026-04-18 migration to 4-artifact structure)

---

## Shipped

The `EPI` (EKS Pod Identity) composition is live, scoped to `xplane-*` IAM resources. Platform users grant AWS permissions to their service accounts by creating an `EPI` claim with a `policyDocument`; the composition creates the IAM role, policy, and `PodIdentityAssociation`. Multi-cluster associations are supported by listing additional clusters in `spec.clusters`.

## Files (at the time)

| Area | Files |
|------|-------|
| KCL composition | `infrastructure/base/crossplane/configuration/kcl/eks-pod-identity/main.k`, `main_test.k`, `kcl.mod`, `settings-example.yaml`, `README.md` |
| Real usage | `security/base/epis/*.yaml` |
| ADR | `docs/decisions/0002-eks-pod-identity-over-irsa.md` |

## Success criteria snapshot

| ID | Criterion | Status at merge |
|----|-----------|-----------------|
| SC-001 | Pods call AWS APIs without explicit credential configuration | shipped |
| SC-002 | IAM roles auto-cleaned when EPI deleted | shipped |
| SC-003 | Credentials rotate automatically | shipped |

> Run `/verify-spec docs/specs/done/2024-Q1/0000-eks-pod-identity/` to attach a fresh VERIFICATION.md from the live cluster.

## Real-world usage

| Service | Namespace | AWS Permissions |
|---------|-----------|-----------------|
| cert-manager | cert-manager | Route53 DNS challenges |
| external-dns | kube-system | Route53 record management |
| external-secrets | security | Secrets Manager access |
| harbor | tooling | S3 bucket access |
| victoriametrics | observability | EC2 instance discovery |

_None — initial implementation matched the plan._
